narrative: An Applied ML Engineer with six years of experience at Freshworks, a product‑first company, based in Kolkata. Strong verified skill depth in machine‑learning frameworks lifts the ranking. Experience with Qdrant, OpenSearch and LlamaIndex directly matches the search‑and‑retrieval focus of the role, while work on scikit‑learn and QLoRA demonstrates the ability to build and fine‑tune models. Career stability and product‑company background add further confidence. However, platform engagement is below average, minor credibility concerns exist, and the notice period is unknown, which could delay onboarding.
